'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 123''' was the one hundred twenty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 5]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Chris Gardner]], [[Rich Handley]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[James McFadden]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]
*[[Kitster Chanchani Banai|Kitster Banai]]
*[[Cindel Towani]]
*[[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]
*[[:Category:Criminal organizations|Galactic Organized Crime]]
*[[IM-455 modular garrison|Imperial Garrison Base]]
*[[R3-T7/Legends|R3-T7 Astromech Droid]]
*[[Data goggles/Legends|Data Goggles]]
*Starship Purchase
